0.text: Significant consolidated densities with a halo sign in the lung parenchyma

1.text: Variable changes in consolidated densities with some decreasing in size, some increasing, and some new lesions

2.text: New lesion measuring up to 23 mm in the paracardiac paramediastinal area, particularly in the anterior upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Previously described consolidated areas in the left upper lobe apicoposterior region have shrunk

4.text: Cavitation in the left upper lobe apicoposterior region
